recommendations.title: The Race

recommendations.title: The Counterfeiters of Paris
recommendations.overview: "Le Dabe" retired many years ago and now he lives in the Tropics where he owns stables and horses. He is a very rich man. He was the king of all money counterfeiters. He is contacted from Paris to organize a new job. He says no. But when he finds out

recommendations.title: Twilight
recommendations.overview: A retired detective accepts a simple task, unaware that it will tear open old, forgotten, but deadly wounds.

recommendations.title: Be Cool
recommendations.overview: Disenchanted with the movie industry, Chili Palmer tries the music industry, meeting and romancing a widow of a music executive along the way.

recommendations.title: Graveyard Shift
recommendations.overview: John Hall is a drifter who wanders into a small town in Maine. He needs a job and decides to seek employment at the community's top business: a large textile mill. He is hired to work the "graveyard shift" -- from around midnight to dawn -- and, alon

recommendations.title: Secret Society of Second-Born Royals
recommendations.overview: Sam is a teenage royal rebel, second in line to the throne of the kingdom of Illyria. Just as her disinterest in the royal way of life is at an all-time high, she discovers she has super-human abilities and is invited to join a secret society of simi

recommendations.title: Amateur Night
recommendations.overview: Guy Carter, an insecure expectant father unable to find work in his field, accepts a job driving hookers around Los Angeles. One long and crazy evening proves to our hero that he is, in fact, up to the task of fatherhood.

recommendations.title: Monte Carlo
recommendations.overview: Three young women vacationing in Paris find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of the girls is mistaken for a British heiress.

recommendations.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.
recommendations.overview: Cal Weaver is living the American dream. He has a good job, a beautiful house, great children and a beautiful wife, named Emily. Cal's seemingly perfect life unravels, however, when he learns that Emily has been unfaithful and wants a divorce. Over 4

recommendations.title: Welcome, or No Trespassing
recommendations.overview: Children rebel against the strict rules and regulations they face during their time in a Communist Young Pioneer camp.
